description: Search, sync, and explore TrendHunter trends from the terminal - offline FTS, agent-native JSON, FAQ Q&A extraction, no API key.

novel_features.name: Trend digest
novel_features.description: Generate a week-over-week digest of new vs repeat trends in a category with top rising keywords.

novel_features.name: Category watch
novel_features.description: Per-category new-only feed - fills the gap that TrendHunter's RSS is global-only.

novel_features.name: FAQ extraction
novel_features.description: Extract the FAQPage JSON-LD from a trend page into structured Q&A.

novel_features.name: Rising clusters
novel_features.description: Surface rising keyword clusters via FTS5 co-occurrence with a rising-vs-prior-window delta.

novel_features.name: Author velocity
novel_features.description: Rank TrendHunter authors and futurists by time-windowed publish rate, not lifetime count.

novel_features.name: Megatrend map
novel_features.description: Walk the related-trend graph two levels deep from a starting slug, returning depth-1 and depth-2 related slugs.

novel_features.name: Agent brief
novel_features.description: One-shot agent brief: top-N ranked trends in a category, each with FAQ Q&A and keywords, rendered as JSON or markdown.

novel_features.name: Inbox cursor
novel_features.description: Show trends seen since the last invocation of `inbox` - a per-machine cursor table.

novel_features.name: Business scout
novel_features.description: Pull top trends in a category, score each by relevance to a business profile, optionally route the scoring through a local LLM.
